detectors.description:
Reentrancy in KaasyToken.transferVestingMonthlyAmount(address) (KaasyToken.sol#843-877):
	External calls:
	- transferFrom(address(this),destination,releaseableNow) (KaasyToken.sol#863)
		- owner.transfer(address(this).balance) (KaasyToken.sol#741)
		- owner.transfer(address(this).balance) (KaasyToken.sol#711)
	- transferFrom(address(this),destination,balances[address(this)]) (KaasyToken.sol#869)
		- owner.transfer(address(this).balance) (KaasyToken.sol#741)
		- owner.transfer(address(this).balance) (KaasyToken.sol#711)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- transferFrom(address(this),destination,balances[address(this)]) (KaasyToken.sol#869)
		- allowed[from][msg.sender] = safeSub(allowed[from][msg.sender],tokens) (KaasyToken.sol#1125)
	- transferFrom(address(this),destination,balances[address(this)]) (KaasyToken.sol#869)
		- balances[from] = safeSub(balances[from],tokens) (KaasyToken.sol#1127)
		- balances[to] = safeAdd(balances[to],tokens) (KaasyToken.sol#1129)
	- transferFrom(address(this),destination,balances[address(this)]) (KaasyToken.sol#869)
		- isMintingFinished = true (KaasyToken.sol#737)
	- transferFrom(address(this),destination,balances[address(this)]) (KaasyToken.sol#869)
		- tradingDate = now + 3600 (KaasyToken.sol#735)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- MintingFinished(now) (KaasyToken.sol#739)
		- transferFrom(address(this),destination,balances[address(this)]) (KaasyToken.sol#869)
	- Transfer(from,to,tokens) (KaasyToken.sol#1131)
		- transferFrom(address(this),destination,balances[address(this)]) (KaasyToken.sol#869)
